holdings.infoBox: MVV is an equity ETF with a total of 410 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares Ultra MidCap400 (MVV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Mid Cap 400 index. The fund provides daily 2x leveraged exposure to a market-cap weighted index of 400 US mid-cap companies. MVV was launched on Jun 19, 2006 and is issued by ProShares.
